THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF JOHN, FABIAN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BABBS, LAWRENCE NULES, EARLINE $4,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $160.00 INTEREST, $260.82 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,420.82, DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
